privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for seiscomp_env configure_event_action_script task. Verified that the environment uses real seismic data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake, sourced from USGS (QuakeML) and GEOFON (miniSEED). Confirmed that the expected script_path (/home/ga/scripts/log_event.sh), log_path (/home/ga/event_activity.log), and config_key (scripts.script) exactly match both the task description instructions and the export_result.sh validation logic. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
